title: Barbacoa Sweet Potato Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this recipe combines the rich flavors of slow-cooked barbacoa with the natural sweetness of roasted sweet potatoes.
instructions: Poke the sweet potatoes with a fork several times and roast for 45-60 minutes or until tender.
Heat the barbacoa in a pan over medium heat.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by slicing the roasted sweet potatoes and serving with warmed barbacoa, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
